calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-25-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

David G. Yen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Bill Cory, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Luke Brugnara.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on April 9, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, October 25, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bill Cory, and against defendant Luke Brugnaro as follows:

Principal - $32,297.21.
Interest - $6,479.44.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $750.00.

Total - $39,626.65.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
